title: Fleet Remediation
subtitle: Automate pull request consolidation across your repositories with policy-driven controls.

fleet.title: Fleet Overview
fleet.description: Per-repository remediation eligibility and policy state.
fleet.error: Failed to load the fleet overview.

preview.title: Dry-run preview — {{repo}}
preview.description: Read-only projection of what a remediation run would do. No changes are made.
preview.blockedByAirGap: This repository is air-gapped; external provider actions would be blocked.
preview.noneSelected: No pull requests would be selected.

autonomyHint.off: Remediation is disabled for this scope.
autonomyHint.dry_run: Previews consolidation plans without making any changes.
autonomyHint.consolidate: Consolidates pull requests but requires human approval before merging.
autonomyHint.auto_merge: Consolidates and merges automatically without human approval.

editor.description: Configure how remediation behaves for this scope.
editor.scopeIdPlaceholder: Enter the repository, team, organization, or user ID

confirmAutoMerge.title: Enable auto-merge?
confirmAutoMerge.description: Auto-merge consolidates and merges pull requests automatically without human approval. This can modify your repositories. Are you sure?
confirmAutoMerge.previewRequired: Run a fleet preview before enabling Auto-merge for the first time, so you can see exactly what a run would do.

editor.noScopes: You don't manage any scopes of this type yet.

policies.title: Policies
policies.description: Remediation policies you manage across your scopes.
policies.empty: No policies yet. Create one to get started.

runs.title: Remediation runs
runs.description: History of remediation runs with live state, CI status, and conflict details.

conflicts.title: Conflicts
conflicts.empty: No conflicts or skipped pull requests.

audit.title: Audit log
audit.description: Append-only record of autonomous merges and closes.

modelAccounts.title: Model Accounts
modelAccounts.description: Configure the AI model providers the agentic remediation tier uses to fix failing pull requests.
modelAccounts.airGapNotice: Air-gapped organizations may only use local providers (Ollama, ONNX). Adding an external provider (Claude, Gemini) to an air-gapped organization is rejected.
modelAccounts.apiKeyHint: Stored encrypted and never displayed again. Leave blank to keep the existing key.
modelAccounts.endpointUrlHint: If Ampel runs in Docker, localhost points at the container — use http://host.docker.internal:11434 to reach an Ollama server on your host.
modelAccounts.empty: No model accounts yet. Add one to enable agentic remediation.

errors.createFailed: Failed to create the model account.
errors.airGapped: This organization is air-gapped: external-egress model providers (Claude, Gemini) are not allowed.

modelCatalog.loadError: Failed to load the model catalog.
modelCatalog.noModels: No catalog models are available for this provider. Use Advanced to enter a model ID.
modelCatalog.customModelIdPlaceholder: Override with an unlisted model ID
modelCatalog.customModelIdHint: A custom model ID overrides the catalog selection above.

hardware.filterHint: Filters local (Ollama) models by system RAM. On discrete-GPU systems, VRAM — not system RAM — is the binding constraint.

pull.title: Model download
pull.notPulled: Not downloaded on this server yet.

playbooks.title: Playbooks
playbooks.description: Customize the remediation prompts the agent uses. Validate a playbook to preview the rendered prompt with no model call.
playbooks.name: Name
playbooks.scopeIdPlaceholder: Owning team, org, or repository ID
playbooks.empty: No playbooks yet. The built-in default playbook is used until you add one.

errors.saveFailed: Failed to save the playbook. Check the YAML for errors.
errors.previewFailed: Failed to render the playbook. Check the YAML for errors.
